description_long: This handcart is constructed primarily from wood, featuring a rectangular flatbed platform with visible wood grain and a natural finish. The cart is supported by four large, spoked wooden wheels, two on each side, which are attached to the frame with visible axles. The sides of the cart are enclosed by sturdy wooden rails, providing containment for cargo while leaving the top open for easy loading and unloading. At the front, a long, straight wooden handle extends outward, designed for pulling or pushing the cart. The craftsmanship suggests durability and functionality, suitable for transporting goods or materials in an urban or park setting. The overall design is rustic and utilitarian, with all structural elements exposed and no additional decorative features.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with four spoked wheels, side rails, and a long front handle, designed for carrying goods. The flatbed platform and open top make it practical for urban transport tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart, the flatbed platform, and the long handle extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the four spoked wheels, wooden side rails, and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo area, wooden rails, and the symmetry of the wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheels, rails, and handle from the other side.
